headline: Assessing Corteva (CTVA) Valuation After Mixed Short And Long Term Share Price Moves
summary: Corteva: recent performance snapshot Corteva (CTVA) has drawn investor attention after a mixed stretch for the stock, with a 3% decline over the past week and a larger pullback over the past month, alongside a positive return over the past 3 months. At a recent close of $79.07, the company carries a market value of about $54.8b. For readers tracking fundamentals, Corteva reports annual revenue of $17.9b and net income of $1.25b from its Seed and Crop Protection operations. See our latest...
